function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and finance schema/rulebooks, then read exact finance records before totaling.
function.outcome_justification: The referenced file 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_04__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md shows counterparty Filamenthütte Wien and total_eur 80. The other read records with the same counterparty are 50_finance/purchases/2025_11_12__eur_000072__bill__toy_forge_pla_bundle.md with total_eur 72 and 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_03__eur_000089__bill__black_library_terrain_spool.md with total_eur 89. Summed total paid to that vendor is 241.
